title: Triplewax Snow Foam Pouch 1.2L – Concentrated Pre-Wash for Thick Foam Cleaning (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
VERSATILE PRE-WASH OR SHAMPOO: Whether used as a pre-wash to tackle stubborn dirt or as a shampoo for regular cleaning, this snow foam enhances the overall cleaning process for a sparkling finish
PRESSURE WASHER COMPATIBLE: Specifically formulated for use with pressure washers and snow foam lances, this snow foam delivers a powerful and efficient cleaning experience
PRESERVES WAX AND SEALANT LAYERS: Triplewax Vortex Blast Snow Foam is specially formulated to provide a deep clean without compromising the protective wax or sealant layers on your vehicle

PREVENT SWIRL MARKS AND SCRATCHES: By effectively removing larger dirt particles before contact cleaning, this snow foam helps prevent swirl marks and scratches, ensuring a safer and smoother cleaning process for your vehicle's surface
SWEET CANDY FLOSS FRAGRANCE: Immerse your car in a delightful candy floss-scented foam that not only cleans but leaves a refreshing and sweet aroma
